plan.title: Port pr_check_protected_issues.py (Layer-3 protected-issue check) to TypeScript

narratives.Description: Port scripts/pr_check_protected_issues.py -- the Layer-3 protected-issue inspector (#701) that refuses a cascade when a PR persistently links a protected/umbrella issue via closingIssuesReferences -- to TypeScript over Node execFile UTF-8-safe capture, reusing @deftai/core/scm gh helpers. It is independently buildable as a self-contained packages/core/src/pr-protected-issues module with a golden parity binary.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Create the packages/core/src/pr-protected-issues module porting the protected-issue link inspection and the refuse/allow decision over Node execFile UTF-8-safe capture, reusing @deftai/core/scm, with vitest unit tests in the module directory.
2. Add packages/cli/src/pr-protected-issues.ts exposing the TS check behind the CLI seam.
3. Add packages/cli/src/pr-protected-issues-parity.ts that runs the TS path and the Python scripts/pr_check_protected_issues.py oracle and asserts byte-identical output with cache off.
narratives.UserStory: As a directive maintainer, I want the protected-issue pre-check available in TypeScript, so that the cascade refuses to merge a PR linking a protected issue with the same decision the Python module makes.

narrative.Acceptance: Running the TS protected-issue check against a PR that links a protected issue returns the same refuse decision the Python pr_check_protected_issues.py module returns.
Running the TS protected-issue check against a PR with no protected-issue links returns the same allow decision the Python module returns.
Running the pr-protected-issues-parity binary returns exit 0 and renders byte-identical output to the Python scripts/pr_check_protected_issues.py oracle with cache off.

expected_outputs: New packages/core/src/pr-protected-issues module with vitest unit tests
Byte-identical parity vs scripts/pr_check_protected_issues.py under cache-off
swarm.missing_traces_justification: #1530 Wave-4b framework-internal TS port traced to GitHub issue #1730 and umbrella epic #1530; no specification.vbrief.json spec-section applies to maintainer tooling.

references.title: Issue #1730: feat(ts-migration): port pr_* monitors + cascade automation to TS (Wave 4)
